summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TrendScout crawlability, public trust, and marketing substance. All 16 test categories passed. Homepage renders correctly with hero, value points, trust bar, audience cards, UK differentiation, how-it-works, features, proof section, pricing preview, and final CTA. All CTAs link correctly. Legal pages (Privacy, Terms, Cookie Policy, Refund Policy) render with all required sections. Sample Analysis page shows Launch Score 74, UK Viability Score 78, 7-signal breakdown, channel fit, strengths, risks, and next steps. Pricing page shows GBP pricing (£19, £39, £79) for Starter/Growth/Pro plans with billing toggle. Cookie consent banner works correctly with Accept all and Reject non-essential buttons. Mobile responsive design verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features verified working. Prerender content works in production build (not dev mode). robots.txt and sitemap.xml accessible. HTML lang='en-GB' confirmed.

homepage.hero_section: PASS - 'Find products that can actually sell in the UK' headline present
homepage.value_points: PASS - 3 value points (Trend detection, Saturation analysis, UK viability)
homepage.trust_bar: PASS - UK ecommerce sellers, 7-signal scoring model
homepage.audience_cards: PASS - 4 cards (Shopify, Amazon UK, TikTok Shop UK, UK Founders)
homepage.uk_differentiation: PASS - 'Not every viral product works in the UK' section

sample_analysis_page.channel_fit: PASS - TikTok Shop UK, Shopify, Amazon.co.uk

privacy_page.all_sections: PASS - 8/8 sections (Information We Collect through Contact)
